---
name: Contribution proposal
about: Discuss and agree scope before opening a pull request
title: "[proposal] <short title>"
labels: ["triage", "contribution"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
Describe the change you want to contribute.

## Problem statement
What problem does this solve?

## Proposed approach
Explain the implementation at a high level.

## Impact
- Configuration impact:
- Backward compatibility:
- Logging/Kafka behavior impact:

## Testing plan
How will you verify the change?

## Additional context
Links, stack traces, or related issues.
